calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-22-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of Two Minors.
Dept. 218, VJ: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Maureen Howard.
Petitioner: Pei Lan Huang, present in pro per as guardian ad litem for the Minor: Jia Ling Huang and Jia Rong Huang, and with Cantonese Interpreter: William Guan.
Co-Petitioner/Minor's Father: Hung Yik Cheung, not present, but consented and signed the petition to the name change of the Minor.
Petitioner and Interpreter were sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minors to: Karen Jialing Cheung and Eric Jiarong Cheung.
Decree signed in open court.
